features.title: Personal Ghost hero
features.body: Each player controls their own Ghost-style commando in the jungle map. The hero is persistent, upgradeable, and tracked per player.

features.title: Player-specific DAT unit IDs
features.body: Every player gets a unique hero unit ID so health, armor, shields, energy, speed, and other stats can upgrade independently.

features.title: Player-specific weapon IDs
features.body: Every player gets unique weapon IDs so crafted weapons and weapon upgrades do not clash with teammates.

features.title: Craft, harvest, survive
features.body: The loop is commando survival: gather minerals, craft stronger weapons, upgrade stats, and keep moving through escalating threats.

features.title: Mobile structures
features.body: Some structures can be built, but the map is mostly on the move. Everything player-built can be deconstructed.

features.title: Resource sharing
features.body: Players will be able to send minerals to each other through the menu system.

features.title: Deep menu system
features.body: Nested menus support weapon crafting, upgrades, structures, team resource transfers, status pages, and future systems.

features.title: Weighted resource locations
features.body: Preplaced units mark candidate resource locations. Runtime logic chooses active locations with weighted random selection.

features.title: Area mob respawns
features.body: Jungle zones maintain pressure by respawning mobs by area instead of only fixed spawn points.

features.title: Audio feedback
features.body: Low HP heartbeat, hurt sounds, and possible Ghost breathing SFX help communicate danger locally to each player.

features.title: Exploding death mobs
features.body: Some enemies will explode or trigger effects on death, such as plague-style variants.

features.title: Simple minerals economy
features.body: Everything gives minerals, just in different amounts. The economy stays readable while the upgrade system gets deep.

evolutions.name: Black Skitter
evolutions.change: Weak starter melee, low HP, short vision.

evolutions.name: Orange Ripper
evolutions.change: Higher damage and faster attack cooldown.

evolutions.name: Red Ripper
evolutions.change: Elite speed, high damage, can pressure wounded players.

evolutions.name: Black Spitter
evolutions.change: Basic ranged attack with modest damage.

evolutions.name: Brown Spitter
evolutions.change: More HP and slightly longer weapon range.

evolutions.name: Orange Needler
evolutions.change: Swaps to a stronger/faster ranged weapon.

evolutions.name: Red Needler
evolutions.change: Longer range weapon and high damage.

evolutions.name: Black Crusher
evolutions.change: Slow tank unit with low early damage.

evolutions.name: Orange Mauler
evolutions.change: Gains speed and stronger melee weapon.

evolutions.name: Red Mauler
evolutions.change: Boss-like armor, HP, and punishing attack stats.

evolutions.name: Brown Bloater
evolutions.change: More HP and death warning behavior.

evolutions.name: Orange Plaguebearer
evolutions.change: Explodes or applies plague-style damage on death.

evolutions.name: Red Plaguebearer
evolutions.change: Larger death effect and higher pressure near groups.

upgrades.title: Crafted weapons
items: Swap away from the default Ghost attack into crafted weapons.
Shotgun: short range burst / possible splash.
Sniper: long range, slower cooldown, high damage.
Flamer or acid weapon: area control concept.
Explosive weapon: anti-pack option with splash tradeoffs.

upgrades.title: Weapon upgrades
items: Weapon behavior swaps by crafted weapon type
